mapper.select: SELECT review_id, content, rating, image_org, image_new, visited_at, visited_time_zone, created_at, content_id, user_id, reservation_id FROM review WHERE review_id = #{review_id}

SELECT r.review_id, r.content, r.rating, r.image_org, r.image_new, r.visited_at, r.visited_time_zone, r.created_at, r.content_id, r.user_id, r.reservation_id, c.title, c.main_image_path FROM review r LEFT JOIN content c ON r.content_id = c.content_id WHERE r.user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT review_id, content, rating, image_org, image_new, visited_at, visited_time_zone, created_at, content_id, user_id, reservation_id FROM review ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_reviews, IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(rating), 1),0) AS avg_rating,
IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rating_5, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rating_4, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rating_3, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rating_2, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rating_1 FROM review WHERE content_id = #{content_id}

SELECT visited_time_zone, COUNT(*) as review_count, ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) as avg_rating FROM review WHERE content_id = #{content_id} AND visited_at IS NOT NULL AND visited_time_zone IS NOT NULL GROUP BY visited_time_zone ORDER BY visited_time_zone
SELECT review_id, content, rating, image_org, image_new, visited_at, visited_time_zone, created_at, content_id, user_id, reservation_id FROM review WHERE reservation_id = #{reservation_id}
